name: CloudWatch Logs Retention 365 Days
description: Ensures CloudWatch log groups have retention set to at least 365 days
query: SELECT _cq_id AS id, log_group_name, retention_in_days FROM aws_cloudwatch_log_groups WHERE retention_in_days IS NULL OR retention_in_days < 365
remediation: Set log retention to 365 days or more. Configure via AWS Console or CLI: aws logs put-retention-policy
